paper_title: Material and Methods of Schansitherium and Samotherium Study

methods.description: Process for examining and describing fossil material of Schansitherium and Samotherium from various museum collections to study their anatomical features.

steps.description: We studied Schansitherium and Samotherium material in Beijing IVPP and Hezheng HPM.
steps.searchable_summary: examine fossil material from Beijing IVPP and Hezheng HPM
outputs: observations of Schansitherium and Samotherium material

steps.description: We also studied in person the Samotherium material in AMNH, NHMUK, and other museums.
steps.searchable_summary: examine Samotherium material in AMNH, NHMUK, and other museums

steps.description: We describe the skull, third cervical vertebra, metacarpal and metatarsal of Schansitherium tafeli from Gansu and of Samotherium boissieri from AMNH, NHMUK, and Gansu.
steps.searchable_summary: describe anatomical features of Schansitherium tafeli and Samotherium boissieri
outputs: descriptions of skull, vertebra, metacarpal, and metatarsal

steps.description: We compare the cranial and post-cranial material of these two taxa.
steps.searchable_summary: compare cranial and post-cranial material of Schansitherium and Samotherium

steps.description: We use cervical vertebral terminology and characteristics established by Danowitz and Solounias and Danowitz et al.
steps.searchable_summary: apply cervical vertebral terminology from Danowitz and Solounias

steps.description: We use metapodial terminology established by Rios et al.
steps.searchable_summary: apply metapodial terminology from Rios et al.
